content: GitHub Actions macOS runners: /bin/bash.062/min for 3-4 core M1/Intel. Free tier 2000 min/month but macOS carries 10x multiplier = ~200 macOS minutes effectively. Self-hosted runners free until March 2026 then /bin/bash.002/min. SPM caching: cache SourcePackages/ and DerivedData/ with actions/cache. Cache key should include Package.resolved hash. 10GB cache limit per repo, DerivedData can be several GB. SPM source download caching saves 3-5 min per run. Hosted runner prices being reduced 15-39% starting Jan 2026.
